# Wave-AVI

> Wave-AVI is a global engineering consultancy delivering advanced AV, IT, connectivity, security and automation systems for superyachts, luxury residences and commercial environments.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Wave-AVI services, industries and global presence.
- [About](/about): Our philosophy, mission and values.
- [Marine](/marine): Superyacht AV, IT and control system engineering.
- [Residential](/residential): Smart home and AV systems for ultra-prime residences.
- [Commercial](/commercial): Hospitality, conferencing and smart building systems.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with our engineering team.
